title: ZOENHOU 10 Pieces 3 Inch Paint Brush Set, Paint Brush Decorating with Treated Plastic Handle, Professional Paint Brushes Tools for DIY Paint, Home, Furniture, Fences, Deck, and Wall Trim
features: PREMIUM MATERIAL - Made of quality nylon, these synthetic filaments can hold more paint to save time with fewer streaks on your walls or trim. With good wear and corrosion resistance, our paint brushes enjoy good toughness without hair loss.

PRACTICAL - You can get a sufficient quantity of 10 paint brushes, which is 3 width inches. Whether you are a professional or a beginner, these paint brushes are reasonably well made, hold a decent amount of paint and don't shed bristles in every direction.

EASY TO USE - From thinner blades to lightweight and easy-to-hold plastic handles, these trim paint brushes are ready-to-use, easy to wash, and provide excellent results for your paintwork. They are economical enough for cleanup and reuse.

FIT FOR ALL - The multi-purpose stain paint brush set is ideal for home, business or industrial use. Such as painting wall, staining, trim, cabinet, door, fence, deck, DIY paint, etc. As they can serve as utility brushes for most paints, stains, varnishes, acrylics and plaster.

WORRY-FREE SHOPPING - Please do not hesitate to contact us if any issues with our professional brush set, you can get 7 days of 24-hour service after receiving it. Just remember that your satisfaction is our first priority.
